text:
Article I'm quoted in on Forbes on the recent Claude model degrading. 

Note, I am not anti-Anthropic in anyway. I loved Opus 4.6 when it first came out. I almost bought a I <3 Claude t-shirt (kinda joking there). 

My concern here is intentional or unintentional model degrades
